questions.context_sentence: Our muscles will not be as strong as now.
questions.hint: 强壮的肌肉(muscle)需要经常锻炼。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Our ______ will not be as strong as now.
questions.cn: 我们的肌肉不会像现在那么强壮。

questions.context_sentence: Label the picture with the words in the list: arm, leg, mouth...
questions.hint: 长长的手臂(arm)可以抱住农场(farm)的小羊。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 用列表中的单词标记图片：手臂、腿、嘴......

questions.context_sentence: When you eat a meal, you use your mouth.
questions.hint: 嘴巴(mouth)张得大，像一只小老鼠(mouse)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 当你吃饭时，你用嘴。

questions.context_sentence: Our fingers will get longer.
questions.hint: 歌唱家(singer)用灵活的手指(finger)弹琴。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们的手指会变长。

questions.context_sentence: A points to the hair, G to the thumb.
questions.hint: 竖起大拇指(thumb)，因为你跳(jump)得高。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: A 指向头发，G 指向拇指。

questions.context_sentence: I think I've got a problem with my ankle.
questions.hint: 叔叔(uncle)走路时不小心扭伤了脚踝(ankle)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我想我的脚踝有问题。

questions.context_sentence: Match the words with the photos: ankle, back, elbow...
questions.hint: 手肘(elbow)在肩膀的下面(below)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: He rested his ______ on the table.
questions.cn: 将文字与照片配对：脚踝、背部、肘部......

questions.context_sentence: My shoulder hurts.
questions.hint: 士兵(soldier)的肩膀(shoulder)很宽阔。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我的肩膀很痛。

questions.context_sentence: My stomach really isn't too good this morning.
questions.hint: 看比赛(match)时太紧张，肚子(stomach)痛。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 今天早上我的胃实在不太好。

questions.context_sentence: B: A chin/throat.
questions.hint: 在船(boat)上大声喊，喊哑了喉咙(throat)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: My ______ is sore, I can't speak.
questions.cn: B：下巴/喉咙。

questions.context_sentence: Don't eat so quickly you'll bite your tongue.
questions.hint: 年轻(young)人喜欢吐舌头(tongue)做鬼脸。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 不要吃得太快，否则会咬到舌头。

questions.context_sentence: Now I've got backache.
questions.hint: 长时间坐着会背痛(backache)，还会头痛(headache)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 现在我腰酸背痛。

questions.context_sentence: The main reason is that we have more and more technology.
questions.hint: 科技(technology)改变了我们的生活。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We have more and more ______ in our lives.
questions.cn: 主要原因是我们拥有越来越多的技术。

questions.context_sentence: Well, no one can be 100 per cent sure, but here are some possibilities.
questions.hint: 一切皆有可能(possibility)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 好吧，没有人能百分百确定，但这里有一些可能性。

questions.context_sentence: So it will probably disappear some time in the future.
questions.hint: 魔术师让兔子消失(disappear)了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 因此，它可能会在未来某个时间消失。

questions.context_sentence: You don't have to do sport to be healthy and keep fit.
questions.hint: 不要总坐着(sit)，要运动来保持健康(keep fit)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 您不必通过运动来保持健康和保持健康。

questions.context_sentence: Who can you talk to about a headache?
questions.hint: 头(head)痛(ache)真难受。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你可以和谁谈论头痛？

questions.context_sentence: LOOK! stomach ache, ear ache...
questions.hint: 肚子(stomach)痛(ache)得打滚。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 看！肚子疼，耳朵疼……

questions.context_sentence: LOOK! stomach ache, ear ache...
questions.hint: 耳朵(ear)痛(ache)影响听力。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: I have an ______ and I can't hear well.
questions.cn: 看！肚子疼，耳朵疼……

questions.context_sentence: LOOK! stomach ache, ear ache, headache, toothache.
questions.hint: 牙(tooth)痛(ache)不是病，痛起来真要命。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 看！胃痛、耳痛、头痛、牙痛。

questions.context_sentence: Our muscles will not be as strong because we won't do a lot of physical work.
questions.hint: 做体力活(physical work)能强身健体。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们的肌肉不会那么强壮，因为我们不会做很多体力劳动。

questions.context_sentence: Our muscles will not be as strong as now.
